intro.speaker: Elder Ward
intro.text: The ancient wards tremble, Jester. Something stirs in the Grounds.

intro.speaker: Elder Ward
intro.text: Guardian beasts, once peaceful protectors, have turned feral. Their chaos threatens to shatter the wards entirely.

intro.speaker: Motley Max
intro.text: Feral beasts? Shattered wards? Sounds like my kind of Tuesday!

intro.speaker: Elder Ward
intro.text: This is no jesting matter! Only by claiming the Ward Stone can you restore balance.

intro.speaker: Motley Max
intro.text: Don't worry, Elder. Chaos is my greatest weapon. Lead the way.

npc_elder_ward_one.speaker: Elder Ward
npc_elder_ward_one.text: One guardian falls — but another still roams the southern floor. Seek it out.

npc_elder_ward_one.speaker: Motley Max
npc_elder_ward_one.text: Already warmed up. Let's keep the momentum!

npc_elder_ward.speaker: Elder Ward
npc_elder_ward.text: Both guardians are defeated. But I sense a greater presence — the Flame Guardian stirs near the eastern wall.

npc_elder_ward.speaker: Elder Ward
npc_elder_ward.text: Defeat the Blaze Lion, then approach the Ward Stone. The wards — and all of us — are counting on you.

npc_elder_ward.speaker: Motley Max
npc_elder_ward.text: One beast of flame between me and glory? Perfect.

npc_elder_ward_first.speaker: Elder Ward
npc_elder_ward_first.text: The Warding Grounds lie ahead. Guardian beasts stand between you and the Ward Stone.

npc_elder_ward_first.speaker: Elder Ward
npc_elder_ward_first.text: Defeat them to prove your worth, then claim the stone to restore balance.

npc_elder_ward_first.speaker: Motley Max
npc_elder_ward_first.text: Consider it done. Nobody out-tricks the Jester of Chaos!

ward_stone.speaker: Ward Stone
ward_stone.text: ✦ The Ward Stone pulses with ancient energy... ✦

ward_stone.speaker: Motley Max
ward_stone.text: Incredible. I can feel the wards stabilizing!

ward_stone.speaker: Elder Ward
ward_stone.text: You've done it! The wards are restored. The Warded Grounds are safe once more.

ward_stone.speaker: Elder Ward
ward_stone.text: You have proven yourself, Motley Max. The title of Ward-Keeper belongs to you.

ward_stone.speaker: Motley Max
ward_stone.text: Ward-Keeper... I like the ring of that. Almost as good as Jester Supreme.

battle_intro_tiger.speaker: Abyss Tiger
battle_intro_tiger.text: GRRRROWL! None shall pass the Warding Grounds!

battle_intro_tiger.speaker: Motley Max
battle_intro_tiger.text: Sorry, big cat — chaos comes through whether you like it or not!

battle_intro_lion.speaker: Blaze Lion
battle_intro_lion.text: You dare challenge the Flame Guardian?! The Ward Stone will never be yours!

battle_intro_lion.speaker: Motley Max
battle_intro_lion.text: Oh, I love a finale. Let's dance!

party_member_gloam.speaker: Gloam
party_member_gloam.text: I sensed the chaos from afar. It called to me... as it always does.

party_member_gloam.speaker: Motley Max
party_member_gloam.text: Gloam! Perfect timing. I could use a puppeteer.

party_member_gloam.speaker: Gloam
party_member_gloam.text: Remember: I pull the strings. Even yours.

npc_verity_vex.speaker: Verity Vex
npc_verity_vex.text: Stop. Before you speak — yes, I know why you are here. I see every thread of it.

npc_verity_vex.speaker: Motley Max
npc_verity_vex.text: Then you know we could use a seer. The guardians grow restless and the Ward Stone stirs.

npc_verity_vex.speaker: Verity Vex
npc_verity_vex.text: I know something worse: what happens if I refuse. Very well, jester. My eyes are yours.

npc_verity_vex_after.speaker: Verity Vex
npc_verity_vex_after.text: Walk on. The future does not wait, and neither should we.
